data.four_set_effect: After using Elemental Skill, increases Normal Attack and Charged Attack DMG by 25% for 8s.
data.two_set_effect: Increases Normal Attack and Charged Attack DMG by 15%.

circlet_of_logos.desc: The first lesson as an apprentice: Vigor, Strength, Will. These words are written on the bandana so you'll never forget them.
circlet_of_logos.title: Martial Artist's Bandana

flower_of_life.desc: This particular kind of red flower was the only thing that could alleviate the Martial Artist's pain.
flower_of_life.title: Martial Artist's Red Flower

goblet_of_eonothem.desc: A rather exquisite wine cup used in pre-combat rituals.
goblet_of_eonothem.title: Martial Artist's Wine Cup

plume_of_death.desc: A common bird feather. Experts use it to practice strength control, while rookies use it to make fans.
plume_of_death.title: Martial Artist's Feather Accessory

sands_of_eon.desc: A tool to keep track of time in endurance training. It is more accurate and reliable than a regular hourglass.
sands_of_eon.title: Martial Artist's Water Hourglass

list.desc: Ever since being recognized by the master, the martial artist had been practicing every day for years.</br>The path of pursuing martial arts is long and harsh, and injuries are inevitable.</br>As instructed, he plucked a small crimson flower in the forest.</br>Although his proud battle scars will never fully heal, at least the pain can be alleviated.</br>
list.title: Martial Artist's Red Flower

list.desc: A bright-red bandana that belonged to a martial artist. The color has now faded.</br>It serves as proof that the bearer practiced martial arts at a young age. It also represents the high ambition the young martial artist once had.</br>Before the first crack of dawn, the young martial artist was already training in the forest.</br>Many years later, the martial artist is now an instructor. Though youth may be a thing of his past, he remains just as alert and diligent as when he was young.</br>
list.title: Martial Artist's Bandana

list.desc: Before proudly stepping into the arena, a parting ritual with a glass of fine wine is essential for martial artists.</br>Each of them faced with a worthy opponent, two martial artists will raise their glasses to one another.</br>They then step into the arena with a calm and collected composure to face their opponent with the utmost respect.</br>This is the true meaning of the toast, which comes before the fight takes place. It does not serve to glorify victory or cast shame on defeat.</br>
list.title: Martial Artist's Wine Cup

list.desc: A feather plucked from a bird soaring in the sky by a skillful martial artist.</br>The essence of martial arts is not necessarily about the power of attacks.</br>Agility and nimbleness honed over years of training are just as prideworthy for a martial artist.</br>The martial artist will wear the feather on his chest as proof of his unparalleled skills.</br>
list.title: Martial Artist's Feather Accessory

list.desc: An hourglass that uses the flow of water to measure the passage of time. The martial artist would have it with him at all times.</br>When he was training under the waterfall or practicing a single leg stance on the stake,</br>he endured all the pain and suffering alone.</br>This time piece recorded every second of it in silence.</br>
list.title: Martial Artist's Water Hourglass
